questions.en: What is the capital of Maharashtra?

explanation.en: Mumbai is the capital of Maharashtra.

questions.en: When is Independence Day celebrated in India?

explanation.en: India celebrates Independence Day on 15 August.

questions.en: What is the capital of Gujarat?

explanation.en: Gandhinagar is the capital of Gujarat.

questions.en: When is Republic Day celebrated in India?

explanation.en: India celebrates Republic Day on 26 January.

questions.en: What is the capital of Punjab?

explanation.en: Chandigarh is the capital of Punjab.

questions.en: Who is known as the Father of the Nation in India?

explanation.en: Mahatma Gandhi is known as the Father of the Nation in India.

questions.en: What is the capital of Haryana?

explanation.en: Chandigarh is the capital of Haryana.

questions.en: What is the national anthem of India?

explanation.en: Jana Gana Mana is the national anthem of India.

questions.en: What is the capital of Himachal Pradesh?

explanation.en: Shimla is the capital of Himachal Pradesh.

questions.en: What is the national song of India?

explanation.en: Vande Mataram is the national song of India.
